hero.subtitle: Frontend developer specializing in building beautiful, responsive web applications with React and modern technologies. Passionate about creating user-friendly interfaces.

cta.subtitle: I'm currently available for freelance work and full-time positions. Let's discuss your next project.

about.label: About Me
about.para1: I'm a 15-year-old frontend developer from Uzbekistan with 1 year of hands-on experience in web development. I specialize in React and modern CSS frameworks, building clean, responsive interfaces that users love.
about.para2: My journey started with curiosity about how websites are built, and now I create web applications using React, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript. I'm passionate about AI technologies and constantly learning new tools to improve my craft. Every project is an opportunity to grow and create something meaningful.
about.expertiseDesc: Focused on building modern, responsive web interfaces with clean code and great user experiences.
about.frontendDesc: Building responsive, performant interfaces with React, Tailwind CSS, and modern JavaScript.
about.backendDesc: Currently learning Node.js to build server-side applications and RESTful APIs, expanding from frontend to full-stack development.
about.apiDesc: Connecting frontend applications with RESTful APIs and handling data seamlessly.
about.responsiveDesc: Creating mobile-first layouts that work perfectly across all devices and screen sizes.
about.aiDesc: Leveraging AI tools and APIs to enhance development workflow and user experiences.
about.gitDesc: Using Git and GitHub for version control, collaboration, and project management.
about.skillsDesc: Constantly evolving my toolkit to stay at the cutting edge of web development. Here's where my expertise currently stands.

projects.label: Komron Xidoyatov
projects.title: Selected
projects.subtitle: A curated collection of projects I've designed and developed. Each one tells a story of problem-solving and creativity.
projects.noProjects: No projects found in this category
projects.keyronDesc: A modern IT company website built with React and TailwindCSS. Features smooth animations, responsive design, service sections, team info, project showcase, and contact form.
projects.velocityDesc: A modern bicycle brand landing page with smooth animations, interactive elements, and minimalist design. Features service tabs, benefits section, and social links.
projects.indoreDesc: A modern plant shop landing page with responsive design, smooth animations, and minimalist UI. Features products, services, testimonials, and contact sections.
projects.fastfoodDesc: A modern burger restaurant landing page with a light color scheme, 3D illustrations, and interactive elements. Features menu, popular items, promotions, and contact info.
projects.abcAutoDesc: A modern web platform for car services. Features a dynamic Mobile-First interface with efficient catalog filtering, smooth UX, and optimized performance built with React and TailwindCSS.
projects.sansiroDesc: A modern online clothing store with clean design and smooth shopping experience. Features product catalog with detailed filtering (by size, color, category) and an interactive shopping cart.
projects.eliasDesc: An interactive personal portfolio website showcasing projects and professional skills. Features clean UI/UX, smooth animations, responsive design, and a contact form.
projects.autokranDesc: A specialized web platform for renting construction equipment and autocranes. Features a user-friendly catalog with parameter selection, comprehensive SEO optimization (sitemap, structured data, meta tags), and a high-conversion contact form optimized for mobile.
projects.dayworkDesc: A modern, clean, and intuitive UI Kit designed for task management, daily planning, and productivity platforms. Features clean minimal design, Auto Layout 3.0, Light & Dark Mode, and ready-to-use screens including Dashboard, Kanban Board, Calendar View, Analytics, and Profile Settings.
projects.statuscodesDesc: An interactive web application designed to help developers quickly reference and understand HTTP status codes. Features detailed explanations, usage scenarios, and practical API code snippets for seamless integration.
projects.spotifyDesc: A modern, fully responsive Spotify Clone built with React and TailwindCSS, inspired by the original Spotify interface. Features intuitive navigation, music albums and playlists view, search, sidebar, media player, and smooth animations for a premium user experience.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: My Learning
experience.subtitle: I started my web development journey in 2025 and have been passionately building projects and learning modern technologies ever since.
experience.descProject: Building modern web applications using React, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript. Currently expanding into backend development with Node.js to become a full-stack developer.
experience.achieveProject1: Developed 8+ web projects including e-commerce platforms, service websites, and landing pages
experience.achieveProject2: Built ABC Auto - a car service platform with responsive mobile-first design
experience.achieveProject3: Created AutoKranUZ with full SEO optimization including sitemap and structured data
experience.achieveProject4: Designed and developed multiple client websites with modern UI/UX principles
experience.achieveProject5: Currently learning Node.js for backend development, building RESTful APIs and server-side applications
experience.eduDesc: Studying frontend web development with focus on React, JavaScript, and modern CSS frameworks. Building real-world projects to strengthen practical skills.
